plugins.name: memory-todo
plugins.description: Memory-based todo management — list, add, complete via natural language (Korean + English)

plugins.name: dylabs-devops
plugins.description: dylabs DevOps runbook — deploy services, manage Terraform, debug Kubernetes, configure monitoring

plugins.name: todo-review
plugins.description: Review todo implementation status via parallel sub-agent investigation — check progress, verify completion, recommend cleanup

plugins.name: side-effect-analyzer
plugins.description: Cross-repo side effect analysis — trace upstream/downstream impact of code changes across all services

plugins.name: dead-code-remover
plugins.description: Dead code analysis and safe removal — detect unused imports, functions, types, classes and remove with build/test verification

plugins.name: feature-flag
plugins.description: Feature flag management across meloming platforms — add, toggle, remove flags consistently across Front/iOS/Android with PostHog
